description: Embeds an uploaded image asset on the canvas at logical coordinates or within a 2D graph at graph coordinates, with an optional scale factor controlling display size.
utility: Embed an uploaded image asset on the canvas or within a 2D graph

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Either at(row, col) for canvas-level placement, or a g2d graph reference for graph-level placement

arguments.name: imageName
arguments.description: Name of the uploaded image asset (without file extension) - e.g., "photo", "balloon", "diagram"

arguments.name: x
arguments.description: X coordinate for graph mode positioning (used with graph reference)

arguments.name: y
arguments.description: Y coordinate for graph mode positioning (used with graph reference)

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: A point expression for graph mode positioning (alternative to x, y)

arguments.name: scale
arguments.description: Scale factor for the image (default 1.0, must be positive). Multiplies the natural width and height.

alternates.description: Place image at logical canvas position without scale
Place image at logical canvas position with custom scale
Place image at graph coordinates (x, y)

alternates.variant: Graph mode with x, y and scale
alternates.description: Place image at graph coordinates with custom scale
Place image at a point expression's position

alternates.variant: Graph mode with point and scale
alternates.description: Place image at a point expression's position with custom scale

examples.scenario: Image with expand effect and rotation
Image placed on graph point with ball
